properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Out of His great love He picked me up Set my feet on a sturdy rock Out of His great love I've learned the meaning of Salvation out of His great love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I had gone astray I had lost my way When I called upon His name Then He rescued me Now the song I sang "What a loving God is He"

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now I shout His praise Through all my days For His endless mercy and grace There's no other one Who has greater love With joy I will ever say

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Out of His great love He picked me up Set my feet on a sturdy rock Out of His great love I've learned the meaning of Salvation out of His great love Salvation out of His great love
